Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1 0 0}Gotta say, I wasn't expectin' to go on another adventure with Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 2 0 0}I bet I'll come outta this in even better shape than last year! Right, Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 3 0 0}Yeah, same here. I'd say he's been a good influence on us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 4 0 0}Oh really? Well, I'd say you've both been slacking off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 5 0 0}What!? C'mon, man, I've been gettin' some exercise in![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 6 0 0}And that's between all our schoolwork! We don't have that much time to train...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 7 0 0}Do you hear how you both sound, making all these excuses?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 8 0 0}Deep down inside, you know how disappointed you are in yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_102_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 9 0 0}Uh, wow, that's a bit harsh. I'm not that disappointing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 10 0 0}Staying true to yourself no matter who you have to fight... That takes guts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 11 0 0}I gotta say, Junpei... I'm impressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 12 0 0}Huh...? Wait, what? Oh, uh... Nah, I was just doin' what anyone'd do, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 13 0 0}You don't have to be so embarrassed, Junpei-san. You're even blushing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 15 0 0}You too, Amada. It felt good knowing I had a reliable partner watching my back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 16 0 0}R-Really? But I didn't, uh... I was just...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 17 0 0}You don't have to be so embarrassed, Amada. You're even blushing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 18 0 0}Seriously? That's extremely childish, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_103_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 19 0 0}Uh, how did this turn into an argument?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_104_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 20 0 0}I realize this may be a bit of an awkward time and place to say this, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 21 0 0}I'm glad you're here, Yukari. It's been too long since we've last seen each other.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_104_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 23 0 0}You're right, Koro-chan. I guess I haven't seen Yukari-chan in a while either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_104_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 24 0 0}Oh, um... I wasn't trying to avoid you guys or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_104_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 26 0 0}There's no need to apologize. What's important is that we're together now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 27 0 0}So, let's resolve this predicament we find ourselves in, shall we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 31 0 0}For... basically making you take my side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 32 0 0}I was just being selfish, and... took my own feelings out on everyone else...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 33 0 0}Hm... I'm afraid I haven't the faintest idea what you mean. Do you, Koromaru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 35 0 0}Come on, Koromaru. Don't answer like you know what's going on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 36 0 0}But he does know. Don't you, Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 37 0 0}Yes, I'm certain that he does, Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_105_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 39 0 0}Why're you all ganging up on me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_106_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 40 0 0}Heh, been a while since the team looked like this, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_106_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 41 0 0}I suppose... From your perspective, this was the original lineup. But with Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_106_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 42 0 0}Yeah, we got the OG squad here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_106_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 43 0 0}There's no point getting all sentimental. Let's just focus on the mission.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_106_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 44 0 0}Damn, Yuka-tan. What's got you all grumpy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_107_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 46 0 0}It just feels right, the team lookin' like this, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 47 0 0}All us old-time Tartarusers, hittin' the road together... Right, Yuka-tan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_107_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 48 0 0}Why would I "feel right" with you around? You're always so loud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_107_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 49 0 0}You say that, but I can tell from how you fight that you're more relaxed as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_107_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 50 0 0}Wh— Mitsuru-senpai! Don't give Junpei the satisfaction or it'll go to his head![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_108_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 53 0 0}Koromaru, wait! Don't just go running ahead of everyone else![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_108_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 54 0 0}Fearless as always... He doesn't seem worried at all about our situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_108_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 55 0 0}Well, I get that he's excited. It has been a while since we teamed up like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_108_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 57 0 0}Hey! I told you to stop running ahead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_109_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 59 0 0}Huh... I'm just thinking, we won't have many more chances to go on walks anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_109_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 60 0 0}Oh, um... It'll be okay. I'll take Koromaru out on jogs after you leave, Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 61 0 0}We're gonna keep training together, so don't worry about us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_110_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 63 0 0}It's been some time since we've actually seen each other in person, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_110_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 64 0 0}It's a little late to be bringing that up now, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 65 0 0}Besides, I'd say that's largely due to you not reciprocating my requests to talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_110_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 66 0 0}I've got my own business to take care of too, you know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 67 0 0}And I won't offer anyone special treatment—not even a Kirijo.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_110_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 68 0 0}Well... No one can say you don't stay true to your convictions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 70 0 0}What're you laughing at? You're creeping me out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 71 0 0}Sorry... I was just thinking back on your choice. It couldn't have been more you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 72 0 0}Of course it was me, I'm the one who made it. Your choice, meanwhile...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 73 0 0}What about my choice?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 74 0 0}I was about to say your choice wasn't like you at all, but actually... It was.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_111_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 75 0 0}Yes, I think so as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_201_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 76 0 0}We'd probably be able to get further more easily with a bigger group, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 77 0 0}At least the two of us will get stronger like this, so I guess it's fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_202_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 78 0 0}Man, it's kinda scary goin' in with just two people. That's a lotta responsibility![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 79 0 0}But don't worry, Ai-chan, I'm here for ya! Just follow my lead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_203_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 80 0 0}Though there may be only two of us, I feel assured with you at my side, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_204_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 81 0 0}Just the two of us, huh? Sounds like a challenge... Heh, fine by me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_205_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 82 0 0}It feels more dangerous with such a small group, but I can handle it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_206_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 84 0 0}Koro-chan seems like he wants to give even more since it's just you and him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_207_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 85 0 0}It's just you and me, Sister! I'll do everything I can to keep you safe![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_208_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 86 0 0}Hey, Aigis... I just... wanted to say, uh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_209_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 88 0 0}What is it, Yukari-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_210_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 89 0 0}Um... Don't worry about it. C'mon, let's do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_211_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 90 0 0}We testin' our strength? Well, bring it on! I'll knock 'em all outta the park![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_212_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 91 0 0}I see you've opted for a lineup consisting of just the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 92 0 0}In that case, I'll do everything I can to ensure that I'm doing my part.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_213_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 93 0 0}Pretty gutsy, going with a team this small. But don't worry, I won't disappoint.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_214_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 94 0 0}Since you're only bringing me along, you must really trust my abilities, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 95 0 0}Well, I'll make sure you don't regret it. Let's do it, Aigis-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_215_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 97 0 0}It's easy to tell when Koro-chan is happy. He must like being paired with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_216_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 98 0 0}I get to be with my sister! Hehe...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_301_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 100 0 0}Hey. I know we're not exactly best friends, but do you really have to glare?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 101 0 0}Like it or not, we gotta work together to get out of this. You, me, Aigis—everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_301_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 105 0 0}You're right. I was glaring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_301_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 106 0 0}Uh... Okay, thanks for being honest, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_302_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 107 0 0}Oh, I got one! Hey, Metis, stop me if you've heard this one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_302_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 108 0 0}Even if I hadn't, I wouldn't care to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_303_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 110 0 0}Hm... A successor unit to Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_303_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 111 0 0}Why are you staring at me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_303_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 112 0 0}Oh, my apologies. I didn't mean to be so rude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_303_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 113 0 0}Uh, you don't really need to apologize...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_304_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 114 0 0}Hm... You seem capable. But I guess that's to be expected from Aigis's sister.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_304_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 115 0 0}Of course! Never underestimate us sisters![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_305_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 116 0 0}You appear to be much shorter in stature compared to the others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_305_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 117 0 0}Well, that's just because they're older than me. I'm not short for my age.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_306_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 121 0 0}You don't have to show me how it's done. I already know how to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_306_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 123 0 0}What!? Well, yes, but still![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_306_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 124 0 0}Huh. I wonder what they're arguing about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_307_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 125 0 0}So, Metis, uh... What kinda things do you like?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_307_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 126 0 0}I like my sister, obviously.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_307_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 127 0 0}Um... Maybe I could've phrased that better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_308_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 128 0 0}I want you to take back what you said.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_308_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 130 0 0}You said I'm "just a kid." I want you to take it back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_308_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 131 0 0}Wow, you, uh... You're really not lettin' that go, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_309_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 132 0 0}I've been wondering... Why did you decide my sister should be the leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_309_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 133 0 0}Hm? Well, her abilities, for one. But mostly because of her intelligence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 134 0 0}A leader must have observational and decision-making qualities such as hers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_310_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 136 0 0}I guess it makes sense for a little sister to cling so tightly to her older sibling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_310_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 138 0 0}It's nothing. Just thinking out loud...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_311_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 139 0 0}We've been teamed up for a while now, but we don't really know each other.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 140 0 0}Once we get out of here and time goes back to normal, let's sit down and talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_311_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 141 0 0}"Once we get out of here"...? Ha... Yes, I'm sure you'll find your way out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_312_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 145 0 0}Hehe, of course you would say that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_312_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 146 0 0}It looks like Metis and Koro-chan are getting along.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_401_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1148 0 0}I know this whole matter is... complicated. But I'm still with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1149 0 0}I'll do whatever I can for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_402_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 737 0 0}Even if we get the key, if those fires go out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 738 0 0}It's scary to think about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_410_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 273 0 0}This whole time, I just felt so alone... Even though I had everyone right by me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 274 0 0}I doubt I'll ever live up to Mitsuru-senpai... She's just incredible. Well, nothing I didn't already know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_411_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 436 0 0}We'll be busy once we're out, but we're still throwin' a welcome party for Metis, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 437 0 0}Let's find out what places she'd like to go to and hit up the town![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 438 0 0}But first, we gear up, press on, and make that future a reality![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_412_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 567 0 0}So our regrets gathered together to form the very entity that created this place... Interesting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 568 0 0}Sounds like we'll have to defeat this thing if we want to put those thoughts to rest. You ready, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_413_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 672 0 0}I thought I had grown accustomed to facing the things I'd rather not see...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 673 0 0}But I still have much growing to do. And with everyone's support, I know I will.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 674 0 0}All right, Aigis... Let's continue onward, together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_414_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 739 0 0}We were so impatient with it all, even before we got stuck here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 740 0 0}But now, we've all acknowledged it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 741 0 0}I'm sure everything will turn out all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_415_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 874 0 0}I thought I was looking at things calmly and rationally...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 875 0 0}But I wasn't. I was just lying to myself the whole time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 876 0 0}And now that I see that... I have to confront it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_416_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1009 0 0}Koro-chan, you seem really happy to be back with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1010 0 0}It feels like we've been apart for a long time, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_416_0_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1012 0 0}Hehe... I think we can all agree on that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_LIMITED_417_0_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1152 0 0}I feel like I finally understand the meaning of the word "friend."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1153 0 0}They spoke about the future as if I would obviously be part of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_002_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 148 0 0}This place doesn't look like Tartarus at all, but it's just as creepy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 149 0 0}We better stay on our toes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_002_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 675 0 0}We don't know anything about this place, so please be cautious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_002_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 742 0 0}I'm a bit nervous, since we haven't done this in a while... Not scared, just nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_003_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 150 0 0}Kinda feels like we're back in Tartarus... Which just sucks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_003_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 440 0 0}We could take on a physical wall, but... What good are fists when we're up against time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_003_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1013 0 0}I'm so, so happy to be here with you, Sister. And I love this armband![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_004_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 441 0 0}Not too long ago, we were climbing up, but now we're heading down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 442 0 0}'Least we might work out different muscles this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_004_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 676 0 0}No big issues so far... But there's still a lot more we don't know than we do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_004_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 743 0 0}I might be a little rusty, but don't worry, I'll still give it everything I've got![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_005_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 151 0 0}I thought I'd at least perform better than this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 152 0 0}I guess enough time's passed for us to get bent out of shape...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_005_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 677 0 0}Nothing seems terribly off... But that in itself is a little eerie...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 678 0 0}Maybe I'm just overthinking it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_005_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1014 0 0}Can they really help my sister...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_006_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 153 0 0}We used to have time for other things, but now all we do is explore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 154 0 0}Isn't it weird for us to go so hard when time's basically stopped?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_006_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 443 0 0}Did she actually think that we would've let her kill us in the first place? Hah![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 444 0 0}Can you believe her? As if we'd go down that easily![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_006_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 445 0 0}Uh... Is that really the problem here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_006_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 679 0 0}My Persona feels a little different now... Maybe it's just because it's been a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_007_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 680 0 0}It's been some time since we've done this... But I'm getting less nervous about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 681 0 0}I can't let myself get too relaxed either, though. I'll stay vigilant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_007_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 744 0 0}I'm actually not really that suspicious of Metis-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 745 0 0}I saw her face when we said we might leave her by herself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 746 0 0}It's hard going through life all alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_007_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1016 0 0}The path ahead is unpredictable, and I don't want to lose you on our way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1017 0 0}So we need to stay close to each other, all right, Sister?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_008_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 155 0 0}I've been thinking about that thing we saw... It's not a Shadow, is it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 156 0 0}Now that we finally have a lead, let's find out where it takes us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_008_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 446 0 0}Is that mysterious figure the one behind all this? Heh, things are getting interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_008_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 682 0 0}This whole place is mysterious, but that shadowy figure was especially so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 683 0 0}I wonder what's really going on here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_009_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 157 0 0}What even was that figure anyway? Hard to believe it has nothing to do with us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 158 0 0}Let's hurry and catch it. We'll get out of here, for sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_009_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 447 0 0}We need more discipline if an opponent of that caliber is considered a threat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_010_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 684 0 0}I didn't know Aigis had a sister unit. It's strange...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 685 0 0}And how did Metis end up here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_010_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 747 0 0}I wonder where that shadowy figure went... Further in, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_010_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1018 0 0}I have no idea what that dark figure is. Where did it come from...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1019 0 0}It better not try to harm my sister...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_011_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 448 0 0}This place looks completely different... Yet we still haven't found any leads.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_011_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 748 0 0}Wow, it suddenly looks so different around here. How much is there to go?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 749 0 0}Tartarus was really long... I wonder if the Abyss of Time will be the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_011_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 750 0 0}Oh god, don't even say that. I don't want to be here for a year![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_011_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1021 0 0}Hey, Sister! You're my sister![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1022 0 0}Oh, um... I was just calling you my sister. Because you said I could, right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_012_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 159 0 0}I wonder how everyone else is doing... Junpei won't get sidetracked, will he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_012_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 160 0 0}I'm sure Koromaru will keep him in line and away from anything strange.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_012_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 686 0 0}It reminds me of Tartarus here... Though I'd rather not think of that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 687 0 0}Is this place as big as Tartarus was too...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_012_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 751 0 0}We probably still have a long way to go, so let's make sure to take breaks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_013_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 449 0 0}We must be over ten floors in by now. Feels like we're nowhere close to the end, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 450 0 0}Is there even an "end" to the Abyss...? Eh, we'll find out if we keep moving along.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_013_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 451 0 0}Sanada-senpai's all over the place, as per usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_013_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 752 0 0}Think we'll end up fighting that dark figure? Whatever it is, it's pretty creepy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_013_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1024 0 0}That has a nice ring to it! I'm so proud of my sister![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_014_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 161 0 0}Metis and Aigis might be sisters, but... They're not much alike, are they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_014_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 162 0 0}W-We definitely are! Why would you say such a thing!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_014_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 163 0 0}N-No need to get huffy! You just give off a different vibe, is all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_014_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 452 0 0}If there's anything I know I can do, I'll get it done and then some.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 453 0 0}The worrying can wait till after all's said and done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_014_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 753 0 0}Koromaru's really been giving it his all. I've gotta do the same![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_015_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 164 0 0}Not much to speak of on our end... I wonder if Mitsuru-senpai found anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_015_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 688 0 0}I'm sure being the new leader is tough, but I'll do all I can to help you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 689 0 0}Let me know whenever you need anything, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_015_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1025 0 0}It's nice getting to walk with someone like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_016_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 454 0 0}So this is it, huh. Nowhere else to go, and no telling what'll come out of this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 455 0 0}Brace yourself, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_016_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 754 0 0}I feel like the mood is different now from when we were in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 755 0 0}What could be waiting for us in here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 165 0 0}What's the deal with this place? Didn't think we'd be sent back to the past...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 166 0 0}Right when I was struggling to muster the courage to look forward, at that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 168 0 0}Haha, don't mind me. I'm just griping. Sorry about that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 275 0 0}Junpei's back—and better than before! This expedition's gonna be nice n' smooth![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 276 0 0}Hehe, how very reliable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 277 0 0}Well, I ain't exactly in top form or anything, so uh, yeah, y'know, fine print and all that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_017_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 877 0 0}Koro-chan seems so happy. Maybe he's glad to be with everyone again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_018_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 278 0 0}So not only are we stuck in time, we're also, like, going back...? What's that all about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 279 0 0}Gotta be something weird behind all this... I mean, what other explanation is there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_018_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 456 0 0}So that was Paulownia Mall last July... Maybe if we kept looking, we'd find—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 457 0 0}No, forget it. What's the point?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_018_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 756 0 0}It really felt like we were back in the past. I can't say I liked it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_019_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 280 0 0}Hm, can't put my finger on it, but... Isn't there somethin' weird about li'l sis here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 281 0 0}Better keep your guard up, Junpei. Stay alert, protect Aigis. Ten-hut![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_019_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 282 0 0}Actually, it'd make me happy if you were so vigilant for my sister's sake.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_019_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 283 0 0}Uh, I-I wasn't talkin' about you or anything! Like, in a bad way! All good things, I swear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_019_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 458 0 0}I honestly hadn't realized it before, but I think I've been pushing myself too hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 459 0 0}We'll have an easier time once we're able to resupply.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_019_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1027 0 0}Seems like everyone's been kinda down lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1028 0 0}I thought finding a supply route would be something to be happy about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_020_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 690 0 0}That Paulownia Mall was strange, but I'm more worried about that dark figure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 691 0 0}Something like that in a place where time doesn't flow normally... What's it mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_020_06_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 693 0 0}Oh, I'm sorry, Koro-chan. I didn't mean to worry you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_020_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 758 0 0}We may not know how this place works, but I'm sure we're making progress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 759 0 0}We even have a way to restock supplies now! That's a pretty good step forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_020_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1030 0 0}The more people we have on our team, the more combat options we have.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1031 0 0}I guess that would be helpful to my sister...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 284 0 0}So how do ya like bein' leader, Ai-chan? Probably not a total cakewalk, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 285 0 0}But, hey, I got your back—100%! Now put on your game face and let's get to marchin'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 286 0 0}Heh, well, someone's confident. Since when did you talk big like that to the leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 287 0 0}Uh, I've always been this confident, though?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 879 0 0}Time keeps starting over, but our energy is still always running out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 880 0 0}The Dark Hour was one thing, but what'll happen if we're here for too long...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 883 0 0}You're right, Koro-chan. I shouldn't let myself worry so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1032 0 0}My sister's friends are actually pretty capable in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1033 0 0}Excuse me? We may be out of practice, but we're more than "pretty" capable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_021_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1034 0 0}You wish to be excused? I don't understand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_022_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 169 0 0}Now that we found a supply route, that's one less thing to worry about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 170 0 0}This really is Tartarus all over again, just with no sleep and no breaks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_022_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 694 0 0}I feel a little better now that Junpei-kun and Koro-chan are with us again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 695 0 0}I hope Kirijo-senpai will return soon too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_022_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 760 0 0}Things have gotten a lot livelier since Junpei-san came back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 761 0 0}Which has its pros and cons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_022_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 762 0 0}C'mon, you couldn't just leave it at "livelier"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_023_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 171 0 0}This is just so frustrating. Combat never felt this hard before, but now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_023_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 288 0 0}All of us explorin' together kinda reminds me of befo— Er, forget that I said anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 289 0 0}Don't wanna kill the mood or nothin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_023_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 885 0 0}Koro-chan's staring at Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 886 0 0}Maybe he's feeling lonely because she can't understand him as well anymore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_024_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 290 0 0}That thing was hangin' around when we were fighting those strong Shadows, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 291 0 0}Probably oughta watch our backs when exploring, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_024_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 460 0 0}That was the same figure we saw before, wasn't it? What's it up to...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 461 0 0}I say we corner it and demand answers. It better not think of giving us the slip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_024_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 717 0 0}I hope we don't end up running into anything too dangerous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_025_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 172 0 0}Finally seems like we're making progress...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 173 0 0}But if this ends up getting us nowhere, I'm gonna lose it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_025_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 292 0 0}Another victory SEES'd! Heh, like my new catchphrase? Juuust kidding! Or am I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_026_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 174 0 0}I wonder how Mitsuru-senpai's doing... I'm a bit worried about her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_026_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 175 0 0}Don't be. I'm sure she's doing just fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_026_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 293 0 0}Oh man, I thought we were gettin' somewhere, but we're probably just halfway, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 294 0 0}Still got a looong ways to go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_026_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 462 0 0}Looks different here. Wonder if the enemies have changed any, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_027_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 295 0 0}The vibes here are kinda off... Thought so when it was just me and Koromaru, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 296 0 0}Throw some Shadows into the mix, and... Euuugh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_027_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 298 0 0}Haha, thanks for the push, pal. Knew I could always count on ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_027_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 763 0 0}Suddenly becoming the leader must've been tough, but you're doing a great job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 764 0 0}I feel very confident every time we go into battle with you in charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_027_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1036 0 0}What was it behind that door...? A Paulownia mole?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1037 0 0}But it didn't seem to resemble any kind of subterranean mammal at all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_027_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1038 0 0}Um, Metis, it's not "mole," it's "mall"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_028_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 176 0 0}Time's not advancing at all, huh... If only it'd stop when I'm studying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_028_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 177 0 0}That'd definitely come in handy for our entrance exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_028_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 178 0 0}And for licenses and certifications, too! Wait... What am I saying?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 179 0 0}We should focus on getting out of here, but I just totally went off track.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_028_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 463 0 0}Huh, I'm the oldest one here right now... Well, you can count on me for anything, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_028_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 894 0 0}I bet he feels like he can do anything right now. You can do it, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_029_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 765 0 0}It feels kind of suffocating, going down this much, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 766 0 0}The airflow hasn't changed, though... Maybe it's just all in my head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_029_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 896 0 0}What're you rushing us for? There isn't gonna be food down there or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 897 0 0}Wouldn't mind if there was, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_029_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 898 0 0}Oh, I guess Sanada-senpai's hungry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_029_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1040 0 0}It's been some time since we saw that unknown figure... But nothing's happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1041 0 0}At least my sister's safe, but I want her to accomplish her goals too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_030_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 181 0 0}We've gone quite a ways by now... Here's hoping we find some kinda clue soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_030_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 299 0 0}Oh, man, guys, this is bad... What do we do?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 300 0 0}We've gotten pretty far, but if we step out for a breather, we're technically still trapped![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_030_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 301 0 0}Junpei... Please, just stop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_030_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 464 0 0}I need to make some adjustments to my current training regimen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 465 0 0}Looks like it's just my stamina that didn't take a hit. Gotta keep up the running.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_031_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 182 0 0}The vibe here is kinda similar to where we found the door to Paulownia Mall, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 183 0 0}Wonder where this one will take us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_031_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1043 0 0}Was that figure just trying to get in our way?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1044 0 0}Or... was it guiding us here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_032_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 184 0 0}The doors reflect the minds of those who enter... Is that actually true?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 185 0 0}Well, I guess anything goes in a place like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_032_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 302 0 0}We all knew what you went through, Amada, but seein' it play out like that, well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 303 0 0}It's totally different hearin' it from someone else... Blindsided us all, I think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_032_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 304 0 0}It's okay, I don't mind. I trust all of you, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_032_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 306 0 0}Sorry, I'm... just getting a little choked up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_032_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 569 0 0}Apologies for the extended absence. I'll be sure to focus on exploring now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_033_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 696 0 0}I keep thinking about what Amada-kun said...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 697 0 0}About "that feeling we all shared"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_033_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 767 0 0}Reliving that memory was tough... But I actually feel better about it this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 768 0 0}Sanada-san got mad on my behalf, and everyone else was there for me too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 769 0 0}I wish I could tell my past self what it'll be like seeing that memory again now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_033_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1045 0 0}I don't understand my sister's friends...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1046 0 0}They say they want to leave this place, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_033_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1048 0 0}Oh, because that makes sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_034_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 186 0 0}Honestly, I'm a bit relieved to have you back with us, Mitsuru-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_034_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 187 0 0}I'm happy to be back. We'll stick together from here on out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_034_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 466 0 0}Reliving those feelings, huh... And here I thought I had myself all figured out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 467 0 0}But I didn't—not until I had to face the truth all over again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_034_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 570 0 0}So... The door has shown us a clue on how to destroy the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 571 0 0}But what, exactly? Is it something in our past? Just what is this place...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_035_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 308 0 0}Awright, next clue, where you at, hm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_035_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 698 0 0}It feels so long since I've navigated for Kirijo-senpai... I'm a little nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_035_06_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 699 0 0}Is that so? Regardless, I'm sure you'll be giving us the best support you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_035_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1049 0 0}Everyone talks about the past so much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1050 0 0}They probably need it to get out of here... And that would help my sister![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_036_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 309 0 0}Hey, Aigis... You sure Metis is your little sister?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 310 0 0}Honestly, I dunno if I can trust her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_036_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 311 0 0}I couldn't care less about your trust, but know this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 312 0 0}We ARE sisters. Make no mistake.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_036_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 313 0 0}THAT'S your takeaway!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_036_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 468 0 0}If he were here... I wonder what he'd say about that door—and what it showed us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 469 0 0}Though I guess thinking about that is just a waste of time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_036_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 572 0 0}Taking on the leader's mantle must be difficult at this time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 573 0 0}But I believe you're capable of seeing it through, Aigis. Give it the best you've got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_037_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 700 0 0}Things like going to school and studying feel natural to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 701 0 0}But navigating for everyone also feels natural.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 702 0 0}It's odd, isn't it? Especially since we explore such dangerous places.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_037_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 771 0 0}Wait... Are our bodies still metabolizing even with time looping...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 772 0 0}Eh, probably better not to think about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_037_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1051 0 0}Sister, let me know right away if you need anything. I'm always here for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_038_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 188 0 0}Aigis as the leader, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_038_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 190 0 0}Yukari-chan...? Are you not feeling well?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_038_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 191 0 0}Mm... No, I'm fine. It's nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_038_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 906 0 0}Koro-chan's always so full of energy after beating a strong enemy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 907 0 0}Maybe he wants to keep up his momentum?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_039_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 703 0 0}Our surroundings may look different, but my readings seem the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 704 0 0}I have to wonder if we're actually making any progress...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_039_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 773 0 0}Maybe I should start running more after we get out of here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_039_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1052 0 0}My sister's protector... You know that's me! Metiiiis! ♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_039_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1053 0 0}Hell of a good mood she's in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_040_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 336 0 0}Phew. Gonna take me a little breather...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 337 0 0}Well, 'least our feet aren't covered in nasty, squishy gunk. Silver lining and all that, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_040_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 477 0 0}If only we could go toe-to-toe with a stronger foe for a change.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 478 0 0}Nothing beats taking on a real challenge to gauge your own strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_040_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 581 0 0}Even after coming this far, I haven't seen Metis behaving suspiciously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 582 0 0}But there's still much we don't know about her, so let's not lower our guard just yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 194 0 0}Everything looks the same in here. It's sooo boring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 195 0 0}For a place so outrageous, you'd think it'd look the part. I oughta spruce it up myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 196 0 0}"Spruce it up"...? How would pine trees make the Abyss more "outrageous"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 316 0 0}Oh man... My head's spinning, looking at the same old scenery for too long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 774 0 0}It must be weird having someone you don't know say they're your little sister.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 775 0 0}If I got a big brother out of nowhere, I wouldn't even know how to feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 776 0 0}Mm, and unexpected siblings could complicate family inheritance matters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_041_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 777 0 0}Uh, yeah, I... I guess I didn't think of that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 474 0 0}If someone told me to take command, I'd do it, but I doubt I'd be the best fit for the job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 475 0 0}Sanada-san as the leader...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 476 0 0}Yeeeahhh, not too sure about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 579 0 0}An abyss of time, indeed... All that we've seen are perfect reconstructions of our memories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 580 0 0}Aigis, let's hurry and progress the expedition. We need to get to the bottom of this, quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 902 0 0}I wonder what Koro-chan thinks about not being able to leave this place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 903 0 0}He doesn't seem particularly bothered by it. He's got enough food, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_042_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 904 0 0}Well, he certainly knows his priorities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_043_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 197 0 0}We better keep moving. Seems like we still have a long road ahead of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_043_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 778 0 0}I'm worried we'll lose track of what floor we're on. I thought this last year too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 779 0 0}Right now, we're on the... 12th floor. Not the 13th. I'm pretty sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_043_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1054 0 0}You know what, Sister's friends? You're doing all right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1055 0 0}But I'm the one who protects my sister. And don't forget it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_044_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 314 0 0}That was the same figure, right? The one we saw before?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 315 0 0}It'd be nice if it just told us what it wants, but nooo, it's too shyyy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_044_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 576 0 0}That strange figure is worrying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 577 0 0}It may be connected to whatever trapped us here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 578 0 0}Let's keep our guard up as we proceed, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_045_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1056 0 0}Is that unidentified figure trying to stop us from progressing...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1057 0 0}Unacceptable. How dare you try to get in my sister's way![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_045_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 867 0 0}That's the second time we've beaten that one. I hope there won't be a third...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 198 0 0}I'm not exactly patient, but I know you gotta take some things one step at a time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 199 0 0}That's very mature of you, Yukari-san. There's a lot I can learn from you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 200 0 0}Uuugh, seriously, how much further do we have to gooo!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 201 0 0}Didn't take very long for her to crack...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 319 0 0}Hm, might look different down here, but I'm guessin' we still have a lotta ground to cover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 320 0 0}Time to buckle up. We've got a long road ahead of us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_046_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 705 0 0}I guess all we can do is keep exploring little by little, just like last year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_047_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 479 0 0}It's frustrating we're trapped in here, but at least there aren't any distractions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 480 0 0}Nobody nagging at you, telling you what to do... Honestly, it's not that bad here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_047_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 583 0 0}The time loop... The Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 584 0 0}I can't help but be reminded of Tartarus and the Dark Hour... Much as I'd rather not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_047_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 909 0 0}Koro-chan? Um, I don't think there's anything there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_048_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 321 0 0}We got so far, but nothing's really changed. Wish something excitin' would happen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_048_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 323 0 0}I meant, good exciting! Not "dangerous" exciting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_048_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 911 0 0}There are actually some things about time not moving that I find reassuring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 912 0 0}Like our families won't be worried about us, since it's all just one day to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_048_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 782 0 0}A hole this deep sitting just under the dorm... It defies physics.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 783 0 0}Tartarus did too. So many impossible things keep happening...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_049_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 324 0 0}Here's an idea: why not knock out our homework while we're stuck here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 325 0 0}Ha, but just 'cause I'm full of good ideas don't mean I always make good decisions![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_049_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 481 0 0}I think I warmed up plenty. I don't know about you, but I'm ready for a real fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_049_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1058 0 0}Working with others is difficult. I never thought about that before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1059 0 0}But I've been doing all right so far... Right? Yes! I've been doing great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_050_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 470 0 0}Tartarus had us going up, but now that we're going down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 471 0 0}Couldn't we just dig a hole in the ground and make ourselves a shortcut?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_050_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 472 0 0}Akihiko, some plans ought to stay on paper.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_050_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 574 0 0}It's plausible she may be a prototype for the next-gen Anti-Shadow Suppression Weapon, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 575 0 0}I suppose it doesn't matter what she is. Better to focus on finding a way out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_050_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1076 0 0}My sister's companions are wearing uniforms... School uniforms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1077 0 0}I wonder if I would look good in one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_051_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 585 0 0}Sometimes, things start to become clearer with experience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 586 0 0}I wonder what this next door will show us... Let's move, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_051_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 914 0 0}Koro-chan's got a glimmer in his eye. Maybe he senses something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 587 0 0}Seeing my middle school self was certainly a strange experience...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 588 0 0}I tried so hard to look in control. Normally, I wouldn't say this about myself, but... It was rather cute.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 784 0 0}It was interesting seeing what Sanada-san was like in middle school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 785 0 0}Maybe... I'll be that tall in a few years too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 786 0 0}Don't worry, kiddo. I'm sure ya got plenty of puberty ahead of ya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 787 0 0}Pu— What!? Why would you put it like that!? Ugh, just forget I said anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 916 0 0}What is it? You've been barking an awful lot lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 917 0 0}And he won't take his eyes off you, Sanada-senpai...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 918 0 0}Maybe he was inspired by what we saw in your past![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_052_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 920 0 0}Heh, whatever you say, buddy. If you're fired up, then so am I![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_053_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 203 0 0}There's no avoiding the past here... But I guess that's what this place is all about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 204 0 0}Let's just assume these memories are clues and move on. What else can we do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_053_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 482 0 0}As Yamagishi and the others have been saying, I doubt Metis has bad intentions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 483 0 0}But that doesn't necessarily mean she's not our enemy. I'll be keeping my guard up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_053_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 706 0 0}After we escape the Abyss of Time, it'd be nice to take Metis around the school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 707 0 0}Hehe... That thought reminds me of when Aigis started attending.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_053_06_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 709 0 0}Great idea, Koro-chan! We can go on your usual walk route to get there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 326 0 0}I've been watching Metis since we all talked, and, well... She really is just a kid, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 327 0 0}Kinda reminds me of... Well, me? Past me, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 328 0 0}Huh... Yeah, I kinda see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 329 0 0}You do!? Hrngh, that's sweet you agree, but man... It's a huge blow to my pride.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 589 0 0}If we were to return to the dorm or Paulownia Mall, we'd find them unchanged.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 590 0 0}This is a different sort of confinement from the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1060 0 0}The school was fascinating, but so is seeing how the human body changes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1061 0 0}You can tell it's the same individual even though they look different...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1062 0 0}Huh... I don't think any of us would have thought that you have such interests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_054_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1063 0 0}Well, it's actually not so different from us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1064 0 0}I think I would recognize my sister no matter what parts she had![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_055_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 205 0 0}I'm starting to feel it in my legs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 206 0 0}Going up was exhausting, but going down... isn't much better, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_055_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 484 0 0}Still can't net that decisive win... Maybe I should change up my footwork next time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_055_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 485 0 0}His head's always in the ring, isn't it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_055_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 710 0 0}What Junpei-kun said is pretty interesting, about how she's like a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_055_06_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 711 0 0}I don't like that. I'm not a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_056_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 788 0 0}Metis-san is "like a kid," huh...? She sure doesn't look like one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 789 0 0}So... Do I address her like someone my age or like someone older than me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_056_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 921 0 0}You've covered a lot of ground. Are you sure none of you are tired?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_056_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 923 0 0}Hehe... Koro-chan, as ready as ever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_056_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1066 0 0}Sister... Is it just me, or are your friends acting differently towards me now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1067 0 0}I don't think it was like this before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_057_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 330 0 0}"This random rich girl lost it," bahaha! That's a good one! Gets me every time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_057_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 331 0 0}At least have the decency not to laugh in my presence, Iori.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_057_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 486 0 0}Hmm, what if we didn't teleport and just ran from the top down instead?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 487 0 0}Surely that'd be easier than going bottom up like we would in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_057_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 591 0 0}Not to downplay our situation, but to be honest, I'm a bit thankful time's stopped.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 592 0 0}...Since it means I won't be inconveniencing anyone with my prolonged absence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_058_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 713 0 0}I feel like we've been exploring with Metis for a while now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 714 0 0}But it's hard to tell with time acting so strangely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_058_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 790 0 0}It doesn't really look like Tartarus here, but it gives me the same uneasy feeling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_058_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 925 0 0}Yeah, I know. You don't have to bark at me like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_058_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 927 0 0}Tch, you just have all the answers, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_059_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 207 0 0}Maybe Metis keeps calling for her sister all the time 'cause she's like a baby chick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 208 0 0}With how they imprint on the first thing they see. I could be wrong, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_059_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 332 0 0}Man, it's just explore, explore, explore, aaall freakin' day. Talk about boooring![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 333 0 0}Eh, not like I was doin' much. Just feel like I oughta be out there, doin' something, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_059_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 334 0 0}Yeah, I think I do know what you mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_059_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 593 0 0}I started a training regimen last year since improving my stamina was a necessity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 594 0 0}I didn't expect to fall back on it so soon, but it's the reason I'm still able to keep walking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_060_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 791 0 0}I bet there's still a lot left to go in this place, so let's try to pace ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_060_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 929 0 0}Ha... Koromaru appears quite spirited, as per usual.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 930 0 0}No matter what happens, you always manage to stay levelheaded. Good boy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_060_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1068 0 0}I could follow my sister forever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_060_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1069 0 0}Well, you've got quite a fan here, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_061_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 595 0 0}I think I've regained my battle prowess, but I admit I'm still far from my best...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_061_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 342 0 0}That midboss ain't so tough now! C'mon, let's keep this train movin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_062_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 209 0 0}Our surroundings changed... But that's like the only thing that seems different.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 210 0 0}Guess that means we gotta keep moving, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_062_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 792 0 0}When our surroundings change, the Shadows might change too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_062_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1070 0 0}I don't know how large this place really is either...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1071 0 0}But it doesn't go on forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_063_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 317 0 0}So you're tellin' me we've been walking for ages, but time's just standin' still?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 318 0 0}Now that don't add up, nope. What happened to all that time I spent walking?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_063_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 490 0 0}We're wiping our enemies out left and right, but still can't unravel this mystery...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 491 0 0}Just means we need to be careful not to run out of steam.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_063_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 596 0 0}The fight against the Shadows just doesn't end. Where are they even coming from?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_064_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 492 0 0}Using Personas is all well and good, but I'm one for hand-to-hand combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_064_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 793 0 0}I hope I'm not holding anyone back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 794 0 0}It's hard to tell. Everything's so different from before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_064_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1074 0 0}Destroy my sister's enemies, show them no meeercy! ♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_064_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1075 0 0}Uh, I guess Metis is... in a good mood...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_065_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 360 0 0}Wish we could just plow through the enemy and go on our merry way in peace.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 361 0 0}But nooope, 'course things can't be that easy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_065_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 597 0 0}Metis knows a great deal about the Abyss, but not much about anything else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_065_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 931 0 0}You've traveled so far down... Please keep being careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_066_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 211 0 0}Ugh, I'm not even as good in archery anymore? This is the absolute worst.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_066_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 795 0 0}It feels like it's been so long since I've spent this much time with you all![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 796 0 0}I wish I was older so we could at least take classes closer to each other...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_066_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1020 0 0}Sister, do you want to go scout up ahead? I'll come with you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_067_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 340 0 0}Been a while since we last saw that figure... Wonder if it'll be a no-show from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_067_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 493 0 0}Time may have stopped, but we're only getting stronger and stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 494 0 0}We're in a rough situation right now, sure, but it might actually be ideal for training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_067_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 599 0 0}I know we need to keep going in search of answers, but it's equally important we pace ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_068_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 715 0 0}It's as if there's an infinite number of Shadows here, like with Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 716 0 0}I wonder how they all got here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_068_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 934 0 0}You've got impressive stamina, Koromaru. Especially for being so small.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_068_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1078 0 0}We haven't seen that figure in a while... And we're pretty far down now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1079 0 0}Maybe it's gonna come back for us at the end like, "Bam!" Be careful, Sister![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_069_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 212 0 0}I thought I got used to seeing the same scenery, but my morale's still taking a hit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 213 0 0}Feels like we're hardly making any progress...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_069_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 341 0 0}For a place overrun with Shadows, it sure is awfully quiet here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_069_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 600 0 0}You'd think we'd be used to exploring on foot after last year, but it's really no easier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_070_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 192 0 0}Fuuka said that figure we saw wasn't a Shadow... So what is it, then?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 193 0 0}If they're the one who trapped us here, we'll make 'em answer for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_070_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 797 0 0}That strange figure again... Let's get it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_070_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1080 0 0}Whatever that weird figure is, it got my sister's attention...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_071_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 601 0 0}Now that we've overcome the hurdle, the path forward is clear. Allons-y, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_071_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 798 0 0}Taking down tough enemies really helps build confidence, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_072_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 214 0 0}We've beaten some really tough Shadows, but it just never ends...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 215 0 0}Seriously, how far do we have to go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_072_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 497 0 0}Wish that, after taking out a strong foe, there'd be another one lined up for us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 498 0 0}Guess I'll just keep holding out hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_072_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 499 0 0}You actually WANT that?[n]{f 1 1}
