Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_072_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1082 0 0}It looks different here... Let's keep our guards up, Sister.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_073_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 343 0 0}In one fell swoop, Junpei-kun emerges victorious—and the crowd goes wild...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 344 0 0}Hrm... They say you can visualize things into reality, but I dunno...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_073_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 345 0 0}That's because you're just daydreaming.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_073_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 799 0 0}This part of the Abyss is longer than the others. It's similar to Tartarus like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 800 0 0}I wish it wasn't, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_073_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 935 0 0}Koro-chan's tail is really going... Maybe he's happy to be with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_074_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 216 0 0}Oh, come on... Still nothing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 217 0 0}Well, we've gotten this far, so we better see this through![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_074_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 602 0 0}Though I'm not sure if my combat skills are up to par, I will say that I'm still fit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 603 0 0}I'll be able to keep going all the way to the very end. You can count on me, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_074_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1084 0 0}Hmph, not that it's bothering me at all. Why would it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_074_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1085 0 0}That's, uh... still buggin' you, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_075_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 248 0 0}Well, one good thing about this place is that the floors are nice and level.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 249 0 0}If we had to move up and down an incline all the time, I think I'd be a goner...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_075_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 381 0 0}If you add 'em all up, we've done explored a hell of a lot of floors, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 382 0 0}There was too many in the first area... Even more in the next, and then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 383 0 0}Yep, just one hell of a lot of floors! Moving on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_075_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 384 0 0}It's good you know when to give up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_075_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 888 0 0}Really...? You sure know a lot, Koromaru-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_075_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 889 0 0}Metis can't be so bad if Koro-chan gets along with her like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_076_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 346 0 0}Are we gonna see someone's past again? It might be a clue, sure, but... Eugh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 347 0 0}Please don't let it be me... Please, oh please...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_076_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 500 0 0}Looks like we made it to the bottom. What's waiting for us this time...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 604 0 0}Iori understood that he wanted a friend who would see him for who he really is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 605 0 0}It's quite impressive, given how long it took me to realize that about myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 801 0 0}Junpei-san gets carried away easily, and he can be frivolous and absentminded...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 802 0 0}But he can be impressive when he puts his mind to something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 803 0 0}Hehe... I've noticed that too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 804 0 0}Yeah, I think we all know it, even if we don't always see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 938 0 0}Ah, the dog of destiny—my fated friend! What's up, buddy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_077_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 940 0 0}Alright, alright, I'm comin'! Don't strain your voice barkin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_078_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 218 0 0}Gossiping is seen as a girl thing, but I think guys do it better, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 219 0 0}Going on and on about striking out, nursing broken hearts... What idiots.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 220 0 0}I remember thinking the same thing back then, but now it's clear you're all hopeless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_078_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 501 0 0}So the doors do mean something... Wonder what, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 502 0 0}We saw when Mitsuru and I met, when Junpei and Koromaru met... Is that it? First encounters?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 503 0 0}Wait, no, Amada's was different. Guess that's back to the drawing board.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_078_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 504 0 0}Akihiko, you'll tire yourself out thinking so hard. Why don't you take a break?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_078_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 505 0 0}True, I'm more for raw power over brain power. In which case, let's move out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_078_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 718 0 0}So Junpei-kun and Koro-chan knew each other even before they awakened...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 719 0 0}I think I'm a little jealous. I wish I knew someone in the group beforehand too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_079_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 606 0 0}These Shadows appear stronger than the earlier ones. Let's exercise caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_079_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 805 0 0}Growing up is tough. There's way more to it than just getting older.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 806 0 0}Those guys in Junpei-san's memory got me thinking about that again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_079_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1086 0 0}Every time we go through one of those doors, they always...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1087 0 0}Whatever. I don't want to think about them. I want to think about my sister.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_080_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 221 0 0}I thought we were finally getting somewhere, but I still don't understand anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 222 0 0}Are those doors actually clues?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_080_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 348 0 0}Honestly, I thought I was gonna die of embarrassment seein' past me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 349 0 0}But now... Hm, how do I put it... Well, I was just doing the best I could back then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_080_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 351 0 0}Haha, man, the hell am I sayin'! Guess I'm more embarrassin' now than ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_080_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 607 0 0}Metis sees something that even the owners of these memories don't...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 608 0 0}Just what is the commonality that they all share...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_081_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 807 0 0}You don't normally get to see memories of others from before you met them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 808 0 0}In that way... Maybe being here isn't all bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_081_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 941 0 0}I guess if I'd found Junpei a little earlier, I could've met up with Koromaru, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_081_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 943 0 0}Yeah... We were this close, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_081_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1088 0 0}Junpei-san seems reinvigorated somehow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1089 0 0}Even though we still don't have any leads... Strange.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_082_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 223 0 0}We take out the queen, we wipe out the hive... If only bug spray worked on Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_082_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 224 0 0}Guess we'll need to invest in some Anti-Shadow Spray, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_082_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 335 0 0}What if we opened that window...? Not that I'd actually do it or anything. Too scary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_082_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 506 0 0}That Shadow just then was...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 507 0 0}Actually, never mind. Junpei's face was more horrifying during his first time with the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_082_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 508 0 0}Could you PLEASE stop bringing that up!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_083_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 609 0 0}The doors disappear once they've served their purpose...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 610 0 0}It may be best to keep that in mind. There's meaning to everything here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_083_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 809 0 0}You all have a lot more stamina than me... I noticed it last year, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 810 0 0}I need to try harder so I can keep up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_083_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 945 0 0}Koro-chan, are you hungry? Just hold on for a little longer, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_084_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 515 0 0}Glad we get to face a tough enemy. Now we're one step closer to our goal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_084_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1111 0 0}I wish I could walk with my sister like this even when we're not exploring...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_085_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 611 0 0}The scenery is different here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 612 0 0}The Shadows may have changed as well. Be ready for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_085_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 811 0 0}I wonder what else is outside of here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 812 0 0}If it's an "abyss," there are probably multiple directions you can fall in from.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_085_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 946 0 0}Koro-chan's been going around in circles for a while now. I wonder why...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_085_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 948 0 0}Hm... It seems he would like someone to scratch his rear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_086_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 228 0 0}We haven't seen the sky in a while... Which is kind of a strange thought to have.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_086_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 495 0 0}Even though we're underground, there's light coming through the windows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 496 0 0}It caught my attention just now. Where the hell is that light coming from?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_086_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 720 0 0}Aigis, I know it must be tough with your new responsibilities as leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 721 0 0}Let me know if you ever need help with anything. I'll do whatever I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_086_06_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 723 0 0}Hehe... I think Koro-chan wants to help out too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 613 0 0}Every now and again, this place reminds me of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 614 0 0}I couldn't explain why specifically. It's just a feeling I have...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 616 0 0}You too? Well, that is certainly validating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 813 0 0}Maybe extra milk...? No, I need something with more protein...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 814 0 0}Hm? What was that, Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 815 0 0}Oh, uh, i-it was nothing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1090 0 0}Sister's enemiiies, go splat and die pleeease! ♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_087_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1091 0 0}Uh... I'm not the only one creeped out by that, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_088_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 229 0 0}I think I'm getting stronger... Maybe not as strong as I used to be, but it's something![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 230 0 0}We just have to keep pressing forward and put an end to this...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_088_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 357 0 0}And here I thought we were finally done with stairs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 358 0 0}Man, at this rate, I'm gonna lose so much weight and wind up the sexiest man alive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_088_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 359 0 0}If you keep wasting your breath, you'll just tire yourself out faster, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_088_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 816 0 0}They don't really calm me down, but taking breaks is still important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 817 0 0}Even Sanada-san respects the need for a rest between rounds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_088_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 818 0 0}That's right. Sounds like you know what you're talking about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_089_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 617 0 0}I'm not sure if she feels the same, but I've grown quite accustomed to Metis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 618 0 0}She's rather... unique, but we've met many unique people over the past year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_089_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 951 0 0}Koromaru's got so much energy. I guess going on all those walks has paid off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 952 0 0}Well, I do a fair bit of walking too, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_089_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1092 0 0}Leave it to me, Sister! I'll beat all those Shadows![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_090_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 338 0 0}The floors here are real nice n' clean, huh? Think the Shadows are polishin' 'em?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_090_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 339 0 0}You know they're not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_090_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 512 0 0}Aigis has really grown as a leader. I'm not really sure how I feel about it since, well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 513 0 0}Never mind, sorry. Didn't mean to make things awkward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_090_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 819 0 0}That strange figure could show up again at any moment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 820 0 0}In fact, I hope it does. Let's keep going, and maybe it will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_091_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 231 0 0}My legs are gonna be so muscly after all this exercise...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 232 0 0}Even though I've been trying so hard to stay slender.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_091_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 821 0 0}It's pretty and all, but I wish we didn't have to be here this long...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_091_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1093 0 0}I love walking with my sister. Hehe![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_091_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1094 0 0}Hey, looks like the kid's havin' a ball.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_092_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 362 0 0}Man, these guys are stubborn as hell![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 363 0 0}They just keep coming one after another. Sure do love us, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_092_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 514 0 0}There it is again! We'll catch it this time, mark my words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_092_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 619 0 0}It simply shows itself and flees... Surely, it intends to set something else on us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 620 0 0}Stay vigilant, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_093_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 622 0 0}That strange figure may have the lead, but we can catch up to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_093_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1096 0 0}That figure keeps just sending Shadows after us and then running away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_094_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 233 0 0}If only the door could pop up after we defeat a tough enemy... Guess that'd be too easy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_094_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 364 0 0}Now that we've gotten past THAT hurdle, it'll be smooth sailin' from here on out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_094_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 365 0 0}Heh, how reassuring. Sounds like you'd be a good fit for the vanguard, Iori.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_094_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 366 0 0}Wha— The, uh... The vanguard? Like... the meat shield?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 367 0 0}Please, oh please, let it be smooth sailin' on the front lines...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_094_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 724 0 0}The scenery has changed again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 725 0 0}And we just defeated a strong enemy. I wonder if that's somehow related...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_095_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 624 0 0}Oh, I apologize. I was simply thinking about how fitting leadership is for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_095_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 822 0 0}The Shadows keep getting even tougher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 823 0 0}But it's not like we're outmatched, of course. Right, Aigis-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_095_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 954 0 0}Koro-chan's always so happy when he's with Aigis. He must like her a lot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_096_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 369 0 0}Getting weaker is always a bummer, but I'd say I'm just about back to 100% now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_096_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 516 0 0}If only the supply route we found took us to the front of the station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 517 0 0}Paulownia Mall is fine, though... Yeah, just... Just fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_096_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1100 0 0}I hope I'll never have to stop walking with you, Sister.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1101 0 0}But it'd be nice if there weren't any Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_097_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 225 0 0}How many floors have we explored by now? I haven't exactly been counting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_097_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 226 0 0}I've been keeping track this whole time. Do you want to hear it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_09702_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 227 0 0}Oh, um, I think I'm good! Knowing the answer for sure would just get me down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_097_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 355 0 0}Wonder what's happening out there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 356 0 0}I just don't want to make other people worry, you know? Worst feeling ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_097_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1026 0 0}Don't worry, Sister. I'm right behind you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_098_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 518 0 0}Keep the battles coming, I'm game. Just make sure we don't burn ourselves out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_098_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 625 0 0}It seems fair to assume that we'll see someone's past behind the next door as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 626 0 0}So far, these memories are nothing to be ashamed of, but let's brace ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_098_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 824 0 0}It's kind of nice getting to move around this much again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 825 0 0}I've basically been doing nothing but studying lately. It made me feel so stiff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_099_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 234 0 0}Seems like we're making a lot of progress... "Seems" being the keyword.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 235 0 0}It sucks we can't see the finish line. I mean, sure, Tartarus was the same, but still.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_099_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 370 0 0}Breaks are important, y'know? With all this explorin', maybe we're due for one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 371 0 0}Liiike, right about... Now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_099_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 372 0 0}You seem to have plenty of energy to spare, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_099_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1102 0 0}A little bit ago, I heard Sanada-san muttering something to himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1103 0 0}I thought I heard him say something like, "Ooh me, ooh she"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1104 0 0}"Me" would be Sanada-san in this context, but who's "she"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_100_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 519 0 0}We've gotten pretty far. Be nice if one of those doors showed up sometime soon, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 520 0 0}Doesn't seem like there's one on this floor, so I guess we gotta keep exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_100_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 826 0 0}What exactly are those things we find items in?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 827 0 0}I gotta say, it's not my favorite way to get stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_100_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 956 0 0}It seems like something's bothering Koro-chan. Is he looking for the door?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 957 0 0}It doesn't look like it's on this floor, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_101_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 236 0 0}Well, this'll be the fourth memory now. Wish they'd start making sense sometime soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_101_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 374 0 0}Maaan, these doors never fail to blow me away. C'mon, open sesame![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_101_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 375 0 0}You sure seem eager. What's gotten into you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_101_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 376 0 0}Ha, I already had a turn! Who's next?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_102_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 828 0 0}The way Mitsuru-san's father spoke reminded me of my mom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 829 0 0}He sounded angry, but... also sad. Nothing like my mom. So why...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_102_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 960 0 0}I don't have anything in my hand, so there's no need to nudge it, Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_102_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 961 0 0}Um, I think he's saying that you can pet him if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_102_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 962 0 0}Oh, are you trying to comfort me? Haha... I'm sorry if I worried you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_102_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1106 0 0}I'll do whatever I can to help my sister... so I don't get left behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_103_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 237 0 0}I feel awful for Mitsuru-senpai... I wish she could've told us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 238 0 0}Everything happens so fast, you only realize later you can always confide in a friend...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_103_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 240 0 0}Aw, Fuuka, don't you start getting sad on me, too. It'll be okay![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 241 0 0}Let's just focus on exploring, okay? There's no reason to dwell on these things anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_103_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 521 0 0}Our priority is figuring out what this place is, but I really want to know what's up with that figure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 522 0 0}Something about it makes me uneasy, and I don't know why...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_103_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1107 0 0}Are you tired, Sister? Please let me know if you are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1108 0 0}I can't heal you, but... I'll carry you on my back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_104_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 629 0 0}Reliving that memory has reinforced my desire to protect others with my powers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 630 0 0}That conviction remains. All that has changed is I now have more to protect.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_104_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 830 0 0}So Mitsuru-san was twelve years old in that memory...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_104_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 385 0 0}Heheheh... I just realized something that no one else has.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 386 0 0}Ladies and gentlemen! We have now reached our 100th floor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_104_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 387 0 0}Er, Junpei-kun? I hate to break it to you, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 388 0 0}We're actually on our 103rd floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_105_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 378 0 0}We were all kids once, huh. Even scary people like Kirijo-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_105_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 380 0 0}Wh-What? I didn't say anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_105_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 242 0 0}Metis said that all the things we've seen have something in common... Maybe—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 243 0 0}Er, never mind. I'm getting ahead of myself. Let's hurry and check out the next door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_105_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 523 0 0}Mitsuru must have taken that pretty hard... But you can barely tell. She looks fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 524 0 0}It can't be easy, dealing with all that. She's more impressive than I thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_106_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 834 0 0}Running efficiency is determined by how your feet land and your posture...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 835 0 0}I've known that since last year, but I always forget once the fighting starts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_106_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 964 0 0}It's important to stay hydrated when you're using so much energy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 965 0 0}Especially for you, Koro-chan. Let Aigis know whenever you need water, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_106_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1109 0 0}From what we've seen, I predict the next door will be much further ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1110 0 0}But I'll get you there, Sister! Just make sure you're prepared for battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_107_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 244 0 0}I need to pull myself together, but I just can't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 245 0 0}I know my nerves aren't making things any easier, either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_107_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 247 0 0}...He just told me to chill out, didn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_107_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 352 0 0}Weee've been walkin' in this daaamn maze, aaall the livelong daaay! ♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 353 0 0}Wasn't very uplifting, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_107_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 354 0 0}Well, if nothing else, it's nice you're cheery enough to sing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_107_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 631 0 0}We've all become adept at exploring, but we still must rest when necessary.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 632 0 0}I'd consider returning while we still have some leeway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_108_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 525 0 0}Exploring's not so bad, is it? We can fight all we like on our way down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_108_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 836 0 0}I'm starting to remember that using a spear takes more than just arm strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 837 0 0}But just knowing something doesn't necessarily make it easy to act on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_108_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 967 0 0}Koro-chan's tail is as straight as an arrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 968 0 0}Maybe that means something, like... He's confident in his own strength![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_109_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 510 0 0}It's unnerving, being trapped here, but if we view this as a chance to focus on training, it'll all be worthwhile.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_109_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 511 0 0}Uh, 'scuse me, sorry, just one thing—we're not training here, we're exploring...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_109_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 891 0 0}Koro-chan's in high spirits. Maybe he's adrenalized after the last battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_110_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 390 0 0}Our surroundings may have changed, but I can feel the truth deep in my bones...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 391 0 0}The road forward will be quite long![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_110_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 392 0 0}Yes, it probably will be very long indeed, Junpei-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_110_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 635 0 0}It is truly a precious opportunity, being able to spend time with you all like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_110_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 970 0 0}Koro-chan doesn't seem to like it when the scenery is suddenly different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_111_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 394 0 0}Stay sharp out there, guys! One mistake can cost you everything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_111_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 395 0 0}Very convincing coming from you, Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_111_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 396 0 0}Whoa! When I said "stay sharp," I didn't mean with your words! They cut, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_111_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 526 0 0}If it's one thing I learned after getting this far...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 527 0 0}...It's that I'm not where I used to be back in my heyday. I need to train even harder.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_111_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 838 0 0}Phew, my legs are starting to get tired. How pathetic...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_112_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 839 0 0}I got used to it in Tartarus, but the floor layouts always changing is unsettling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 840 0 0}I didn't mind it much before, but it's not something I really want to get used to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_112_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 841 0 0}Agreed. Desensitization to something so abnormal would be quite disconcerting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_112_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 973 0 0}Hehe... Koro-chan keeps looking back to check on everyone. What a kind soul.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_112_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1112 0 0}Humans are supposed to become fatigued from prolonged exercise...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1113 0 0}So the humans with us must be physically exceptional.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_112_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1114 0 0}Heh... Our training's not just for show, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_113_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 397 0 0}You know, exploring with everyone again got me thinking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 398 0 0}Mostly about how dumb I was last year... And how much more I could've done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_113_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 528 0 0}To think... We're all being held prisoner by time. Strange, huh? It's not even tangible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 529 0 0}It'd be nice if we could simplify things, like move time by breaking walls or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_113_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 530 0 0}Where is the logic in that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_113_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 726 0 0}I'm having trouble with some of those notes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 727 0 0}They're quite detailed, but not very orderly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 728 0 0}I think I'm going to need more time to figure them out. Please sit tight, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_114_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 636 0 0}There are no limits to how much we can improve ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 637 0 0}Any level of skill lost can eventually be regained.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_114_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 638 0 0}That's right—training never ends. Glad to see you get it now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_114_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 843 0 0}You can trust me to watch our backs. I've gotten pretty good at it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_114_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1115 0 0}Sister, you look so dignified walking out in front, leading us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_115_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 531 0 0}Before all this, I'd never have imagined repeating the same day over and over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 532 0 0}...What does this mean for my training schedule, then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_115_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 533 0 0}Oh yeah, that thing. That thing that's totally booked for the next six months?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_115_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 639 0 0}The sheer number of Shadows here seemed odd to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 640 0 0}Though it appears more logical if this place truly is related to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_115_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 641 0 0}Yes, I agree. I'll try to find anything that can confirm that connection for sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_115_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1116 0 0}The most important thing to me is my sister. And that's not going to change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_116_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 250 0 0}I'm feeling better now after all this moving around... Well, a little bit better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 251 0 0}There's just a lot on my mind... Honestly, I feel as if I'm drowning in my thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_116_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 399 0 0}Man, all this walkin' is really puttin' some wear and tear on my poor kicks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 400 0 0}Thought I wouldn't have to change 'em out for a while after last year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_116_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 844 0 0}It feels like Metis-san is kind of wary of us again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 845 0 0}It's better than it was at first, but it'd be nice if she started trusting us more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_116_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 847 0 0}I just don't understand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_117_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 534 0 0}That figure showed up to set the stage for our fight on the next floor, didn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 535 0 0}Heh, doesn't matter what Shadows are lying in wait for us. They're all going down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_117_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 642 0 0}If Metis is right, that figure may have something to do with our situation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 643 0 0}Either way, we'll have to catch it to find out. Let's go, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_117_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 975 0 0}Koro-chan's been on edge ever since he saw that shadowy figure...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 976 0 0}I wonder what he senses about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_118_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 848 0 0}I'm worried about that figure and what its ultimate goal might be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_118_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1117 0 0}That unrecognized figure ran away again. It probably wants us to go after it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_119_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 401 0 0}Huh, the scenery's changed again. Guess that means we still got a ways to go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 402 0 0}We've seen that so many times now that even I caught on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_119_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 644 0 0}The seemingly never-ending floor count does remind me of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 645 0 0}We can only hope that number won't be as high as last time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_119_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 978 0 0}Koro-chan seems enthusiastic, but I hope he's not just forcing it for our sakes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 979 0 0}This expedition has been going on for some time. I'm worried about him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_120_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 536 0 0}Train as though you're in a real battle... Battle as though you're training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 537 0 0}Gotta be in top form at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_120_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 849 0 0}Spears are great in battle, but they can be kinda heavy to carry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_120_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1120 0 0}I'm fine. Nothing's wrong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_121_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 254 0 0}What the doors all had in common... The things Mitsuru-senpai knew...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 255 0 0}I need to think this all over some more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_121_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 538 0 0}Hm... I can't seem to organize my thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 539 0 0}Sorting my head is starting to be just as difficult as physical training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_121_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 646 0 0}Aigis, remember to give adequate support to each member of the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 647 0 0}I'd like to myself, but I'm not sure I'll be able to manage on my own...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_122_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 403 0 0}The li'l sis seems kinda huffy, don'tcha think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 404 0 0}Sure, she's always had an attitude with us, but... I dunno. It's different this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_122_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 729 0 0}I wonder why this place exists, and how it came to be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_122_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 850 0 0}It seems like there are as many Shadows here as there were in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 851 0 0}I hope Fuuka-san will figure out why. There's too much we don't know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_123_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 256 0 0}I feel like I'm starting to get back into the groove, but really I'm just scraping by.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 257 0 0}Heck, I used to— Ugh, never mind, why bother comparing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_123_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 540 0 0}We'd be able to exploit the Shadows' weak points more easily if we knew more about their anatomy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 541 0 0}It's frustrating how differently they're built from humans.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_123_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 542 0 0}Wow, Sanada-san knows the human body's weak points... Incredible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_123_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1121 0 0}Maybe I don't fit in because... I really am just a kid?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1122 0 0}No, that can't be it... Definitely not... Right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_123_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1123 0 0}Metis, are you all right? Do you need a break?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_124_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 407 0 0}Whoa! I nearly tripped and tumbled over just now. Watch your step, Ai-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_124_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 648 0 0}Despite its inconvenience, this situation has provided a valuable experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_124_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 981 0 0}Koro-chan's right behind you all, just like he was last year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 982 0 0}I get the sense he won't back down for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_125_02_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 253 0 0}Yukari-chan's been really quiet, hasn't she...? I'm a bit worried about her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_125_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 509 0 0}I can take out the weaker enemies here no sweat. I'm ready for a challenge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_125_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 633 0 0}Perhaps I ought to help Yamagishi analyze those documents, rather than leave it all to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_125_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 634 0 0}Oh, not at all! You're needed on the battlefield. Leave the paperwork to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_126_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 852 0 0}There's no room for hesitation now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 853 0 0}Whatever caused this whole thing is waiting for us, so let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_126_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1125 0 0}Sister, it's the door! Go ahead, open it yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 649 0 0}Yukari has remained consistent in her ability to fight with undaunted resolve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 650 0 0}That side of her saved me once, and for that, she will always have my gratitude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 651 0 0}Uh, I can hear you, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 652 0 0}Yes, I would assume you could. And?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 653 0 0}Mitsuru-senpai... You're sure not afraid to be direct, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 730 0 0}Metis might be right about the past being all we talk and laugh about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 731 0 0}I feel like the future hasn't been a very pleasant topic lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 732 0 0}Not just since we got trapped in here, but since... that day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_127_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1126 0 0}I'm not sulking or anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1127 0 0}I just... don't get to talk to my sister as much as all of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_128_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 408 0 0}I think Yuka-tan's been feelin' off lately. Kinda like how she was when I first joined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 409 0 0}We should do something for her, remind her that we're there for her, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_128_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 412 0 0}Honestly... There's no need to go out of your way and do anything weird, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_128_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 544 0 0}Aigis's sister has a point. These memories are all important—and painful, at that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 545 0 0}The fact she won't tell us where she came from still rubs me the wrong way, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_128_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 546 0 0}I'm not trying to rub you in any which way. I don't even care what you think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_128_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 854 0 0}This place was always weird, but now it's getting scary too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 855 0 0}I wonder what we'll see in the next door. We've got to be ready for anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 413 0 0}So... I was the only one who didn't get what the doors all have in common, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 414 0 0}Don't sweat it. Wouldn't be the first time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 415 0 0}Hey, what're you tryin' to say!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 984 0 0}What is it, Koromaru? Did you find some Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 985 0 0}Actually, I think he just wants you to pet him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 986 0 0}Oh, is that what it is? Well... Maybe later. We should stay focused for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_129_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1130 0 0}Uh... Approaching others is tough, huh? Maybe just try to relax a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_130_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 258 0 0}Now that we know what the doors have in common... how do we get rid of the Abyss?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 259 0 0}Well, no point wasting time thinking in circles. We just have to keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_130_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 548 0 0}Amada basically suggested we reflect on our reasons, but... I'm drawing a blank.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 549 0 0}Feels like I'm off my game. Like I'm doing mittwork and nothing's landing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_130_04_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 550 0 0}Oh, a classic Sanada-san-ism! Totally flies over your head if you're not into boxing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_130_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 989 0 0}Koro-chan seems down... Maybe he has something on his mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_131_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 654 0 0}The past has been far from exclusively blissful, and yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 655 0 0}What your sister said is undoubtedly true, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_131_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 733 0 0}There's a lot to think about. I should've already been thinking about it all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_131_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 856 0 0}I'm thinking about what'll come up next and what we might have to do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 857 0 0}Whatever it is, I'm sure it'll be tough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_132_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 260 0 0}Are we making any progress? Everything looks the same as ever, so it's a bit worrying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_132_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 416 0 0}Once li’l sis' mask thing comes down, there's just no getting through to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 417 0 0}Guess there's not much we can do if she just shuts us out like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_132_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 551 0 0}The experience gleaned from battling is invaluable. Last year really drove that home for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 552 0 0}But it's hard to find a place where combat is a daily occurrence... At least in Japan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_133_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 656 0 0}I've been thinking about engaging in more "small talk" lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 657 0 0}But I find it exceedingly difficult. Perhaps it's just not one of my strengths.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_133_05_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 658 0 0}Well, uh, it ain't really somethin' you can just decide to be good at.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_133_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 858 0 0}This is much simpler than last year. All we have to do is keep exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 859 0 0}But unlike last year, we can't leave whenever we want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_133_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1131 0 0}This is difficult. Though I'm not sure what about it is difficult...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1132 0 0}Maybe that's why it's difficult...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_134_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 418 0 0}Wasn't Fuuka's reaction kinda weird? What's she tryin' to say about that figure...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_134_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 991 0 0}Huh... The way Koro-chan reacted just now... Could it mean...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_134_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1133 0 0}Let's go after it quickly. We need it to get out of here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_135_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 262 0 0}Actually, never mind. We'll learn what it is once we catch it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_135_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 553 0 0}That was supposed to stop us? Seems they're underestimating us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 554 0 0}Let's hurry. We'll definitely catch that figure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_136_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 419 0 0}Dunno 'bout you guys, but I'm pooped. All the more reason to get pumped![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 420 0 0}Lookin' like crap just makes you feel even worse, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_136_03_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 423 0 0}Yeah? You get me, bud? 'Preciate you, I really do, Koromaru![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_136_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 860 0 0}Looks like we've made some more progress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 861 0 0}It's not ideal that our surroundings changing is our only indication of that, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_136_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1134 0 0}It feels different here... We need to be prepared for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_137_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 555 0 0}Only easy pickings around here, huh... Perfect. Just what I needed to lift my mood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_137_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 661 0 0}For most of last year, our goal and how to achieve it seemed relatively clear. But now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_137_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 734 0 0}I've been making some progress going through those notes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 735 0 0}I'll be able to share what I find soon. I should probably organize it all first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_138_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 424 0 0}The Shadows ain't gonna go any easier on us just 'cause we're off our game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 425 0 0}They didn't last year, and they sure won't start now. Wish they'd chill, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_138_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 556 0 0}Our priority right now is to press forward and keep exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 557 0 0}We can't afford to waste any more time getting lost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_138_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 993 0 0}Koro-chan's back in high spirits. Did seeing that figure do something...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 994 0 0}Hm... I'm probably just overthinking it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_139_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 662 0 0}It feels as if doing all we can is never enough. It's frustrating...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_139_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 862 0 0}She can't tell us anything about herself because she has no memories...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 863 0 0}I wonder if that's true or if Metis-san just doesn't want us to know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_139_08_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 864 0 0}I have nothing to say to that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_139_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 995 0 0}Koro-chan never leaves Aigis's side... Maybe he's protecting her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_140_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 263 0 0}Hurry, we have to catch up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 264 0 0}I know saying it out loud won't make a difference, but still, I just have to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_140_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 426 0 0}Runnin' around, seein' the same sights over again... Now that's what I call good exercise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_140_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1135 0 0}I just have to protect my sister. That's what I'm here to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_140_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1136 0 0}What're you sulking about? Something wrong?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_141_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 427 0 0}Exploring's dangerous and tiring, yeah, but sittin' on our asses is just not an option.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_141_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 663 0 0}Everyone seems to be weighed down by something. It's similar to last...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 664 0 0}No, we should focus on our current predicament. In fact, we need to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_141_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1139 0 0}Uh, never mind, it's nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_141_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1141 0 0}No. Bad. Don't be so nice to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_141_11_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1142 0 0}Huh... What's that supposed to mean...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_142_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 558 0 0}Last year, we fought so that we could live to see tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 559 0 0}Who'd have thought we'd be stuck in time and may never see tomorrow again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_142_06_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 736 0 0}At least we know a lot more than we did at first, but I'm still feeling uneasy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_143_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 428 0 0}You know, we've been so busy lately that I haven't had much time to stop and think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 429 0 0}But now that we're stuck exploring, I've been looking back on all kinds of stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_143_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 665 0 0}Manipulation of time... It reminds me of my grandfather's original goal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 666 0 0}I can't say I've ever shared his desires.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_143_09_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 997 0 0}Koro-chan keeps checking on you all like he's looking out for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 998 0 0}He really seems like a leader...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_144_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 560 0 0}It's finally showed itself to us. Now we just chase it down—all there is to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_144_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 865 0 0}If whatever it is we need to see is at the end, we just have to push through to it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 866 0 0}That's all we have to do. In fact, it's all we can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_144_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1143 0 0}We have to keep moving. Um, not that I think you don't know that, Sister...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_145_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 667 0 0}I believe it'd be wise to put stock in Yamagishi's earlier report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 668 0 0}All that's left is to confirm it with our own eyes. Let's go, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_145_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1001 0 0}Koro-chan seems restless, even with that strong enemy defeated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1002 0 0}Maybe he senses what's waiting up ahead...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_146_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 268 0 0}Huh? Our surroundings changed again. That's a sign of progress... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_146_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 430 0 0}Alright, back in the game! Let's wrap this up, so we can get the hell outta here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_146_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 561 0 0}The Shadows here might be different since we're in a new area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 562 0 0}Let's change up our battle strategy if needed. Gotta stay light on our feet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_147_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 868 0 0}It's weird to think this is technically all one day, even though it feels so long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_147_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1004 0 0}Koro-chan's always so bold and confident... He's amazing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_147_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1144 0 0}I have to be helpful to my sister. That's my only purpose...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_148_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 431 0 0}I know it's kinda late to ask, but... What the heck is behind this whole time loop thing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_148_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 563 0 0}Even the weaker Shadows can still pack a punch. Best we can do is return the favor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_148_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 669 0 0}As tempting as it may be to proceed hastily, let's remain cautious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_149_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 870 0 0}I want to get to the end, but I also kind of don't...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_149_09_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1006 0 0}Koro-chan's staring at Aigis. What's he trying to say to her...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1007 0 0}I can't tell, but even so, just the look in his eyes makes me feel relieved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_149_11_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1145 0 0}I've said it before, but one more time... Actually, I'll probably keep saying it many more times...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1146 0 0}I'm here for you, Sister. And I always will be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_150_02_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 269 0 0}I think... We're nearly there. Just a little longer now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 270 0 0}Well, I hope so at least. I don't really know if we are or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_150_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 432 0 0}Kinda hard to breathe down here, huh? I mean, we've gotten pretty far...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_150_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 489 0 0}No need to push yourself, Aigis. Breaks are also essential to a proper regimen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_151_03_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 434 0 0}Think we'll be able to bust outta here soon? And finally be done with the 31st...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 435 0 0}Wonder if folks'll think it's weird we all got super buff in a day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_151_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 670 0 0}What I must do— No... What I myself want to do hasn't changed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 671 0 0}Nor will it, no matter what awaits us. Surely, you feel the same, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_151_08_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 871 0 0}I keep wondering about what could be ahead of us, causing all this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 872 0 0}Maybe there's no way to know, and it's pointless trying to figure it out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 873 0 0}But... I want to keep thinking about it anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_152_05_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 659 0 0}I seem to be regaining my combat abilities at a reasonable rate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 660 0 0}Whatever gets in my way, I'm ready to face it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_152_04_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 564 0 0}There's no telling what we're up against... till we come face-to-face with it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 565 0 0}Which means we just need to focus on preparing for anything and everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_DNG_REGULAR_152_00_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 1 1147 0 0}I really respect your determination, Sister. I always have.[n]{f 1 1}
